content-right-description1:
Overview

A block used for multiblocks energy input currently including:
content-right-description2:
Usage

In any multiblock this block will act as the input slot for energy.
Every energy Input will add 10.000 RF storage and upgrade the energy input flow
content-right-description3:
Block Info

arlib:block_energy_input_block
Hardness: 0.5
Blast Resistance: 2.0
Require Tool: NO
Sealable: YES
Multiblock: NO
